passive_skill.name: Departing Anew
passive_skill.description: After the wearer uses Skill or Ultimate on one ally character, the wearer regenerates 6 Energy and the ability's target receives 1 stack of "Hymn" for 3 turn(s), stacking up to 3 time(s). Each stack of "Hymn" increases its holder's DMG dealt by 15%. After every 2 instance(s) of Skill or Ultimate the wearer uses on one ally character, recovers 1 Skill Point.

passive_skill.name: King of Knights
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by 36%. When using their Ultimate, increases the wearer's ATK by 40%, and if the wearer's Max Energy is greater than or equal to 300, regenerates a fixed amount of Energy equal to 10% of the wearer's Max Energy and increases their ATK by 40% for 2 turns.

passive_skill.name: Steerer
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by 36%/42%/48%/54%/60%. When the wearer hits an enemy target, inflicts Mirage Fizzle on the enemy, lasting for 1 turn. Each time the wearer attacks, this effect can only trigger 1 time on each target. The wearer deals 24%/28%/32%/36%/40% increased DMG to targets afflicted with Miragle Fizzle, and the DMG dealt by the wearer's Ultimate additionally increases by 24%/28%/32%/36%/40%.

passive_skill.name: A Knight's Pilgrimage
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by 36%/42%/48%/54%/60%. When the wearer uses Ultimate, increases the wearer's Ultimate DMG based on their Max Energy. Each point of Energy increases the Ultimate DMG by 0.36%/0.42%/0.48%/0.54%/0.60%, up to 180 points of Energy.

passive_skill.name: Mental Training
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by 20%/23%/26%/29%/32%. For every debuff on the enemy target, the wearer's CRIT DMG dealt against this target increases by 8%/9%/10%/11%/12%, stacking up to 3 times. When using Ultimate to attack the enemy target, the wearer receives the Disputation effect, which increases DMG dealt by 60% and enables their follow-up attacks to ignore 24%/28%/32%/36%/40% of the target's DEF. This effect lasts for 2 turns

passive_skill.name: Long Night
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by 36%/42%/48%/54%/60%. Increases the wearer's Skill and Ultimate DMG by 18%/21%/24%/27%/30%. After the wearer uses their Skill or Ultimate, they gain Somnus Corpus. Upon triggering a follow-up attack, Somnus Corpus will be consumed and the follow-up attack DMG increases by 48%/56%/64%/72%/80%.

passive_skill.name: Defiant Till Death
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by 18%/21%/24%/27%/30%. When the wearer uses Basic ATK, they will gain one stack of Dragon's Call for 2 turns. Each stack of Dragon's Call increases the wearer's ATK by 18%/21%/24%/27%/30% and Energy Regeneration Rate by 6%/7%/8%/9%/10%. Dragon's Call can be stacked up to 2 times.

passive_skill.name: Heir
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Energy Regeneration Rate by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18% and regenerates 1 Skill Point when the wearer uses their Ultimate on an ally. This effect can be triggered after every 2 uses of the wearer's Ultimate. When the wearer uses their Skill, the next ally taking action deals 30%/35%/40%/45%/50% more DMG for 1 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Chase
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT rate by 8%/10%/12%/14%/16%, and increases their CRIT rate against enemies with HP less than or equal to 50% by an additional 8%/10%/12%/14%/16%. When the wearer defeats an enemy, increase their ATK by 20%/25%/30%/35%/40% for 2 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Deeply Engrossed
passive_skill.description: Greatly increases the odds that the wearer will be attacked and increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by 36%/42%/48%/54%/60%. After the wearer uses their Ultimate, they receive 1 stack of Firedance, lasting for 2 turns and up to 2 stacks. Each stack of Firedance increases the DMG dealt by the wearer's follow-up attack by 36%/42%/48%/54%/60%.

passive_skill.name: Center of Attention
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer’s CRIT DMG by 48%. While the wearer is on the field, for every Elation character on the team, increases the Skill Point upper limit by 1, up to 3. For every 1 Skill Point the wearer consumes, ignore 5.0% of enemy targets’ DEF when this unit deals Elation DMG, stacking up to 4 times. If 4 or more SP are consumed in the same turn, the wearer gains “Stream Promo,” which increases all allies’ Elation by 20%. Light Cone effects of the same type cannot stack.

passive_skill.name: Thorns
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's ATK by 24%/28%/32%/36%/40%. After the wearer uses an attack, for each different enemy target the wearer hits, regenerates 3.0/3.5/4.0/4.5/5.0 Energy. Each attack can regenerate Energy up to 3 time(s) this way. After the wearer uses their Ultimate, all allies gain 12/14/16/18/20 SPD for 1 turn.

passive_skill.name: Opening
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's ATK by 20%/25%/30%/35%/40%. After the wearer uses Skill or Ultimate on one ally character, increases the target's Elation stat by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24% for 2 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Conquer
passive_skill.description: Increase the wearer's ATK  by 64%. After using Ultimate to attack, recovers 1 Skill Point. When the wearer uses their skill on one ally character, increases the Skill DMG dealt by the target by 54% for 3 turns.

passive_skill.name: Boundless Thought
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's ATK by 8%/9%/10%11%/12%. After using an attack, for each enemy target hit, additionally increases ATK by 4%/5%/6%/7%/8%. This effect can stack up to 5 times and last until the next attack. If there are 3 or more enemy targets hit, this unit's SPD increases by 8%/10%/12%14%/16%, lasting for 1 turn(s).

name: Flame of Blood, Blaze My Path

passive_skill.name: Vista
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Max HP by 18% and Incoming Healing by 20%. When using Skill or Ultimate, consumes HP equal to 6% of the wearer's Max HP and increases the DMG dealt by this attack by 30%. If this effect's consumed HP is greater than 500, the DMG additionally increases by 30%. If the current HP is not sufficient, this effect reduces the wearer's current HP down to 1.

passive_skill.name: Pacify
passive_skill.description: Every time an ally attacks, the wearer gains 1 stack of Cantillation. Each stack of Cantillation increases the wearer's Energy Regeneration Rate by 3.0%/3.5%/4.0%/4.5%/5.0%, stacking up to 5 time(s). When the wearer uses their Ultimate, removes Cantillation and gains Cadenza. Cadenza increases the Wearer's ATK by 48%/60%/72%/84%/96% and increases all allies' DMG dealt by 24%/28%/32%/36%/40%, lasting for 1 turn(s).

name: I Shall Be My Own Sword

passive_skill.name: With This Evening Jade
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by 20%/23%/26%/29%/32%. When an ally (excluding the wearer) gets attacked or loses HP, the wearer gains 1 stack of Eclipse, up to a max of 3 stack(s). Each stack of Eclipse increases the DMG of the wearer's next attack by 14%/16.5%/19%/21.5%/24%. When 3 stack(s) are reached, additionally enables that attack to ignore 12%/14%/16%18%/20% of the enemy's DEF. This effect will be removed after the wearer uses an attack.

passive_skill.name: Intimidation
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by 15%/17.5%/20%/22.5%/25%. When the wearer launches a follow-up attack, they gain 1 stack of "Luminflux" to a max of 2 stacks. Each stack of "Luminflux" enables the Ultimate DMG dealt by the wearer to ignore 27%/30%/33%/36%/39% of the target's DEF. When the wearer's turn ends, removes 1 stack of "Luminflux."

passive_skill.name: Presage
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by 36%. After the wearer launches a Follow-up ATK, additionally regenerates 12 Energy and gains "Presage," lasting for 2 turn(s). While the wearer has "Presage," all ally targets' CRIT DMG increases by 48%. When entering battle, the wearer regenerates 21 Energy and gains "Presage," lasting for 2 turn(s).

name: In the Name of the World

passive_skill.name: Inheritor
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's DMG to debuffed enemies by 24%/28%/32%/36%/40%. When the wearer uses their Skill, the Effect Hit Rate for this attack increases by 18%/21%/24%/27%/30%, and ATK increases by 24%/28%/32%/36%/40%.

passive_skill.name: Flowers and Butterflies
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by 18%/21%/24%/27%/30%. While the wearer is in battle, for every 10 SPD that exceeds 100, the DMG of the wearer's Basic ATK and Skill is increased by 6%/7%/8%/9%/10% and the CRIT DMG of their Ultimate is increased by 12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. This effect can stack up to 6 time(s).

passive_skill.name: Mirage of Reality
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer’s Effect Hit Rate by 24%/28%/32%/36%/40%. When the wearer deals DMG to an enemy that currently has 3 or more debuffs, increases the wearer’s CRIT Rate by 12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. After the wearer uses their Basic ATK, Skill, or Ultimate, there is a 100% base chance to implant Aether Code on a random hit target that does not yet have it. Targets with Aether Code receive 12%/14%/16%/18%/20% increased DMG for 1 turn.

passive_skill.name: All-In
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's DEF by 40%/46%/52%/58%/64%. When the wearer provides a Shield to an ally, the wearer's CRIT DMG increases by 40%/46%/52%/58%/64%, lasting for 2 turn(s). When the wearer's follow-up attack hits an enemy target, there is a 100%/115%/130%/145%/160% base chance to increase the DMG taken by the attacked enemy target by 10%/11.5%/13%/14.5%/16%, lasting for 2 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Mind Game
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by 12%. When the wearer uses Ultimate, increases the Skill and Ultimate DMG dealt by the wearer by 60%, lasting for 3 turn(s). After the wearer. uses Ultimate, if this instance of Ultimate consumed 140 or more Energy, recovers 1 Skill Point.

passive_skill.name: Deceit
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's SPD by 18%. After the wearer uses an attack, there's a 120% base chance to inflict "Bamboozle" on every enemy. While under  "Bamboozle", enemies have their DEF decreased by 16% for 2 turns. If the wearer's SPD is higher or equal to 170, there's a 120% base chance to inflict "Theft" on every enemy. While under "Theft", enemies have their DEF decreased by 8% for 2 turns. When "Bamboozle" or "Theft" is repeatedly inflicted, only the recently inflicted instance takes effect.

name: Life Should Be Cast to Flames

passive_skill.name: Smelt
passive_skill.description: When the wearer's turn starts, regenerates 10 Energy. If the enemy target has a Weakness implanted by the wearer, increases the wearer's DMG dealt to it by 60%. When an enemy target gets attacked by the wearer, the wearer decreases the target's DEF by 12%, lasting for 2 turns. The same types of effects cannot stack.

name: Long May Rainbows Adorn the Sky

passive_skill.name: Tolerant
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer’s SPD by 18%. When the wearer uses Basic ATK, Skill, or Ultimate, consumes all allies’ HP equal to 1% of their current HP. After the next attack of its memosprite, additionally deal 1 instance of Additional DMG equal to 250% of the total consumed HP to the attacked target. Then, the total consumed HP is reset. When the wearer’s memosprite uses its Skill, increases the DMG taken by all enemies by 18% for 2 turn(s). Effects of the same type cannot stack.

passive_skill.name: Rebirth
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Break Effect by 60%. When an enemy target's Weakness gets broken, there is a 100% base chance to inflict the "Charring" state on it, which increases its Break DMG taken by 18%, lasting for 2 turn(s). This effect can stack 2 time(s).

passive_skill.name: Engrave
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Max HP by 30%. When the wearer or their memosprite loses HP during their own turn, the wearer gains "Death Flower," which allows the wearer and their memosprite to ignore 30% of the target's DEF when dealing DMG, lasting for 2 turns. When the wearer's memosprite disappears, advances the wearer's action by 12%. This effect can only trigger up to 1 time, and the trigger count resets every time the wearer uses Ultimate.

passive_skill.name: Reception
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's SPD by 6%/7.5%/9%/10.5%/12%. After the wearer uses Skill, increases the DMG dealt by all allies by 8%/10%/12%/14%/16%, lasting for 3 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Verdict
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's DEF by 24%/28%/32%/36%/40% and Effect Hit Rate by 24%/28%/32%/36%/40%. Increases the chance for the wearer to be attacked by enemies. When the wearer is attacked, increase their DEF by an additional 24%/28%/32%/36%/40% until the end of the wearer's turn.

passive_skill.name: Immolation
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Break Effect by 60%. When entering combat, increases Break DMG dealt by the wearer and another teammate who triggered combat by 32%. If there is no teammate who triggered combat, applies this effect to the wearer and the teammate with the highest Break Effect. Effects of the same type cannot be stacked. When the wearer applies Weakness to an enemy target, recovers 1 Skill Point. This effect can only trigger once, and trigger count resets when using Ultimate.

passive_skill.name: Deep, Deep Breaths
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Energy Regeneration Rate by 12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. When any ally uses their Ultimate, the wearer restores HP for the ally currently with the lowest HP percentage by an amount equal to 10%/11%/12%/13%/14% of the healed ally's Max HP. When the wearer provides healing for an ally, increases the healed ally's ATK by 2.4%/2.8%/3.2%/3.6%/4.0%. This effect can stack up to 5 times and lasts for 2 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Meteor Swarm
passive_skill.description: For every enemy on the field, increases the wearer's ATK by 9%/10.5%/12%/13.5%/15%, up to 5 stacks. When an enemy is inflicted with Weakness Break, the DMG dealt by the wearer increases by 30%/35%/40%/45%/50% for 1 turn.

passive_skill.name: Exorcism
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Break Effect by 60%70%/80%/90%/100%. When entering battle, immediately regenerates 30/33/35/38/40 Energy. After the wearer uses Ultimate, obtains "Raiton." After using 2 Basic ATKs, advances the wearer's action by 50%/55%/60%/65%/70% and removes "Raiton." After the wearer uses Ultimate, resets "Raiton."

name: On the Fall of an Aeon

passive_skill.name: Moth To Flames
passive_skill.description: Whenever the wearer attacks, increase their ATK by 8%/10%/12%/14%/16% in this battle, up to 4 time(s). When the wearer inflicts Weakness Break on enemies, the wearer's DMG increases by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24% for 2 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: The Plum Fragrance In My Bones
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Break Effect by 60%/70%/80%/90%/100%. After the wearer uses their Ultimate, increases all allies' DMG by 24%/28%/32%/36%/40%, lasting for 3 turn(s). Should the wearer's Break Effect exceed or equal 150%, 1 Skill Point will be recovered. At the start of each wave, immediately regenerates 10.0/13.0/15.0/18.0/20.0 Energy for all allies. Effects of the same type cannot stack.

passive_skill.name: Hone
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Max HP by 30%. At the start of the wearer's turn, they regenerate a fixed amount of 20 Energy. This effect can trigger 1 time each wave. After the wearer uses a Skill Attack, inflicts the target with the "Purgatory" state, lasting for 2 turn(s). While in the "Purgatory" state, CRIT DMG taken by the target increases by 30%, and CRIT DMG taken from the wearer additionally increases by 30%.

passive_skill.name: Crystallize
passive_skill.description: Increases wearer's Effect Hit Rate by 40%/45%/50%/55%/60%. When the wearer deals DMG to an enemy inflicted with Wind Shear, Burn, Shock, or Bleed, each respectively grants 1 stack of Prophet, stacking up to 4 time(s). In a single battle, only 1 stack of Prophet can be granted for each type of DoT. Every stack of Prophet increases wearer's ATK by 5%/6%/7%/8%/9% and enables the DoT dealt to ignore 7.2%/7.9%/8.6%/9.3%/10% of the target's DEF.

passive_skill.name: Rough Water
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Break Effect by 60%/70%/80%/90%/100%. The Break DMG dealt by the wearer ignores 20%/23%/26%/29%/32% of the target's DEF. When the wearer's Break Effect in battle is at 150% or greater, increases their SPD by 12%/14%/16%/18%/20%.

passive_skill.name: Contentment
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Break Effect by 60%/70%/80%/90%/100%. After the wearer uses Ultimate to attack enemy targets, inflicts the targets with the "Woefree" state, lasting for 2 turns. While in "Woefree," enemy targets take 10%/12%/14%/16%/18% increased DMG. They effect of increasing DMG taken is additionally boosted by 8%/10%/12%/14%/16% if the wearer's current Break Effect is 150% or higher.

passive_skill.name: Visioscape
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Max HP by 24%/28%/32%/36%/40% and Energy Regeneration Rate by 12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. When the wearer's HP is reduced, all allies' DMG dealt increases by 9%/10.5%/12%/13.5%/15%, for 2 turn(s). At the start of every wave, restores HP to all allies by an amount equal to 80%/85%/90%/95%/100% of their respective lost HP.

passive_skill.name: Sweet Dreams
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by 30%/35%/40%/45%/50%. When the wearer's Basic ATK or Skill does not result in a CRIT Hit, increases their CRIT Rate by 36%/42%/48%/54%/60% for 1 turn(s). This effect can only be triggered 1 time every 3 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Chaos Elixir
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Break Effect by 20%/25%/30%/35%/40%. When the wearer unleashes their Ultimate, increases DoT dealt by the wearer by 24%/30%/36%/42%/48% for 2 turn(s). When the target suffering from the wearer's DoT is defeated, the wearer regenerates 4/5/6/7/8 Energy.

passive_skill.name: Kinship
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's ATK by 24%/28%/32%/36%/40%. When the wearer defeats an enemy or is hit, immediately restores HP equal to 8%/9%/10%/11%/12% of the wearer's ATK. At the same time, the wearer's DMG increases by 24%/28%/32%/36%/40% until the end of their next turn. This effect cannot stack and can only trigger 1 time per turn.

passive_skill.name: Treasure
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Effect RES by 8%/10%/12%/14%/16%. If the wearer is attacked and has no Shield, they gain a Shield equal to 16%/20%/24%/28%/32% of their Max HP for 2 turn(s). This effect can only be triggered once every 3 turn(s). If the wearer has a Shield when attacked, the DMG they receive decreases by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%.

passive_skill.name: Subsume
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by 18%. At the start of battle or for every 4 instances of Follow-Up ATK the wearer uses, the wearer gains "Umbra Devourer," lasting for 3 turns. While the wearer has "Umbra Devourer," increases ATK by 40% and increases the DMG taken by all enemies by 20%. Effects of the same kind cannot stack.

passive_skill.name: Hrunting
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by 16%. When entering battle and if the allies' Skill Points max limit is 6 or higher, increases the wearer's ATK by 40%. After the wearer uses a Skill, increases their ATK by 10%, stacking up to 4 time(s).

passive_skill.name: Unfulfilled Yearning
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by 18%/21%/24%/27%/30% and their Max HP by 18%/21%/24%/27%/30%. When the wearer is attacked or consumes their own HP, their DMG increases by 24%/28%/32%/36%/40%. This effect is removed after the wearer uses an attack.

passive_skill.name: A Promise
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's SPD by 18%. When the wearer's memosprite uses a Memosprite Skill on an ally, gains "Blank," which increases DMG taken by all enemies by 10%. When the wearer's memosprite uses a Memosprite Skill on an enemy, gains "Verse," which increases CRIT DMG of all allies by 16%. When the wearer's memosprite has both "Blank" and "Verse," increases the effects of "Blank" and "Verse" by 60%.

passive_skill.name: Worldly Affairs Leave No Mark
passive_skill.description: Increases Effect Hit Rate by 60%/70%/80%/90%/100%. After the wearer uses Basic ATK, Skill, or Ultimate to attack, there is a 60% base chance to inflict "Unarmored". While in the Unarmored state, target receives 10%/12%/14%/16%/18% increased DMG for 2 turns. If the target is under a DoT inflicted by the wearer, there's a 60% chance to upgrade "Unarmored" to the "Cornered" state, which increases the DMG the target receives by 14%/16%/18%/20%/22%, lasting for 2 turns. During this, the wearer can't inflict "Unarmored" on the target.

passive_skill.name: New Scale
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's ATK by 64%. When the wearer uses Ultimate, restores HP equal to 10% of the wearer's ATK for all allies, and additionally restores HP equal to 10% of the wearer's ATK for the character with the lowest current HP, and grants "Redoubt" to all allies for 3 turns. Targets with "Redoubt" deal 24% more DMG, which further increases by 12% if the targets have summons.

passive_skill.name: Dispossession
passive_skill.description: The wearer's base SPD increases by 12. When the wearer deals DMG, ignores 18% of the target's DEF. After the wearer uses Ultimate, obtains "Blazing Sun," which is removed at the start of their turn. While "Blazing Sun" is in possession, increases the wearer's DMG dealt by 60%.

passive_skill.name: Morn, Noon, Dusk, and Night
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Max HP by 18%/21%/24%/27%/30% and Outgoing Healing by 12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. When the wearer heals allies, record the amount of Outgoing Healing. When any ally launches an attack, a random attacked enemy takes additional DMG equal to 36%/42%/48%/54%/60% of the recorded Outgoing Healing value. This additional DMG is of the same Type as the wearer's, is not affected by other buffs, and can only occur 1 time per turn.

passive_skill.name: Establishment
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's base SPD by 12. After the wearer and the wearer's memosprite attacks, the wearer gains 1 stack of "Brocade." Each stack of "Brocade" increases the wearer's and their memosprite's CRIT DMG by 9%, stacking up to 6 time(s). When reaching maximum stacks, each "Brocade" stack additionally increases Basic ATK DMG dealt by 9%.

passive_skill.name: Sleepless
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Max HP by 30%. When the wearer's memosprite uses an ability, the wearer gains "Noctis." While the wearer has "Noctis," all allies' memosprites ignore 20% of the target's DEF when dealing DMG. Increases the DMG dealt by the wearer and their memosprite by 30%. When the wearer's memosprite disappears, the wearer recovers 8 Energy. Effects of the same type cannot stack.

passive_skill.name: Daydream
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by 60% and Energy Regeneration Rate by 10%. When the wearer's Max Energy is greater than 120, for every 10 points of Max Energy that exceeds this amount, further increases Energy Regeneration Rate by 0.3%. Up to a maximum of 360 points of excess Max Energy can be taken into account. When the wearer uses Elation Skill, increases the DMG received by all enemies by 15% for 2 turn(s). Effects of the same type cannot stack.

passive_skill.name: Guaranteed Victory
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's SPD by 18%, and the Elation DMG dealt ignores 20% of the target's DEF. When the wearer uses Ultimate on themselves, gains 20 "Punchline." This effect can be triggered up to 1 time, and will be reset after using Basic ATK 3 time(s).

passive_skill.name: Game Changer
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's SPD by 18%. When the wearer enters combat or uses Ultimate on an ally target, the wearer gains "Great Fortune" for 3 turn(s). While the wearer has "Great Fortune," all allies' CRIT Rate increases by 10%, CRIT DMG increases by 30%, and the wearer's Energy Regeneration Rate increases by 12%. At the start of each wave, the wearer regenerates a fixed amount of 15 Energy.

passive_skill.name: Metamorphosis
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Break Effect by 60%/70%/80%/90%/100%. When the wearer deals Break DMG to an enemy target, inflicts Routed on the enemy, lasting for 2 turn(s). Targets afflicted with Routed receive 24.0%/28.0%/32.0%/36.0%/40.0% increased Break DMG from the wearer, and their SPD is lowered by 20%. Effects of the similar type cannot be stacked.

passive_skill.name: Solo
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Effect Hit Rate by 40%. When the wearer inflicts a debuff, there is an 80% base chance to apply "Enthrallment", lasting for 3 turns. Effects of the same type can't stack. While affected by "Enthrallment," each debuff inflicted by the wearer on the target increases the target's DoT taken by 5%, up to 6 times. When attacked by an ally, increases the attacker's SPD by 10% for 3 turns. When the wearer is knocked down, removes all "Enthrallment."

passive_skill.name: One At A Time
passive_skill.description: Increase the wearer's CRIT Rate by 18%/21%/24%/27%/30% and their follow-up attacks' DMG by 30%/35%/40%/45%/50%. After the wearer uses a follow-up attack, apply the Tame state to the target, stacking up to 2 stacks. When allies hit enemy targets under the Tame state, every Tame stack increases the CRIT DMG dealt by 12%/14%/16%/18%/20%.

passive_skill.name: Promise
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by 16%/19%/22%/25%/28%. While the wearer is in battle, for every 20% CRIT DMG that exceeds 120%, the DMG dealt by follow-up attack increases by 12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. This effect can stack up to 4 times. When the battle starts or after the wearer uses their Basic ATK, enables Ultimate or the DMG dealt by follow-up attack to ignore 20%/24%/28%/32%/36% of the target's DEF, lasting for 2 turns.

passive_skill.name: Longing
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by 12%. The DMG dealt by the wearer's Ultimate and Follow-up ATK increases by 24%.

passive_skill.name: Spare No Effort
passive_skill.description: Increases DMG dealt by the wearer by 20%/25%/30%/35%/40%. The wearer also deals an extra 20%/25%/30%/35%/40% of DMG to enemies whose current HP percentage is equal to or higher than the wearer's current HP percentage.

passive_skill.name: Massacre
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by 12%. The Skill DMG and Ultimate DMG dealt by the wearer increase by 24%.

passive_skill.name: Quiescence
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Break Effect by 28%/35%/42%/49%56%. After the wearer uses their Ultimate, increases their SPD by 8%/10%/12%/14%/16%, lasting for 2 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Quick on the Draw
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Effect Hit Rate by 20%/25%/30%/35%/40%. When the wearer attacks enemies that have reduced DEF, regenerates 4/5/6/7/8 Energy.

passive_skill.name: Scrutinize
passive_skill.description: Increase the wearer's CRIT Rate by 8%/10%/12%/14%/16%. The wearer deals 24%/30%/36%/42%/48% more CRIT DMG to enemies that are currently DEF reduced or Slowed.

passive_skill.name: Inspire
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's DEF by 16%/20%/24%/28%/32%. For every on-field character that has a Shield, the DMG dealt by the wearer increases by 4%/5%/6%/7%/8%.

passive_skill.name: Cannot Stop It!
passive_skill.description: When the wearer uses their Ultimate, all allies' actions are Advanced Forward by 16%/18%/20%/22%/24%.

name: Day One of My New Life

passive_skill.name: At This Very Moment
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's DEF by 16%/18%/20%/22%/24%. After entering battle, increases DMG RES of all allies by 8%/9%/10%/11%/12%. Effects of the same type cannot stack.

passive_skill.name: Insight
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Effect RES by 12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. For every 100 of DEF the wearer has, increases the DMG dealt by 0.8%/0.9%/1.0%/1.1%/1.2% to a max increase of 32%/36%/40%/44%/48%.

passive_skill.name: Academy Style Edit
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's SPD by 8%/9%/10%/11%/12%. After attacking enemy targets that are Weakness Broken, regenerates 3/4/4/5/5 Energy. This effect can trigger up to 2 time(s) per turn.

passive_skill.name: Solidarity
passive_skill.description: After the wearer uses a certain type of ability such as Basic ATK, Skill, or Ultimate, all allies gain Childishness, which increases allies' DMG for the same type of ability as used by the wearer by 12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. Childishness only takes effect for the most recent type of ability the wearer used and cannot be stacked.

passive_skill.name: Self-Confidence
passive_skill.description: Increases Effect Hit Rate of its wearer by 20%/25%/30%/35%/40% and increases DoT by 24%/30%/36%/42%/48%.

passive_skill.name: Semibreve Rest
passive_skill.description: Increases the Break Effect dealt by the wearer by 16%/20%/24%/28%/32%, and increases their DMG to enemies afflicted with Shock or Wind Shear by 16%/20%/24%/28%/32%. This also applies to DoT.

passive_skill.name: Wager
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's ATK by 12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. When the wearer lands a CRIT hit on enemies, they will gain a stack of Good Fortune. This effect can be stacked 4 time(s). Every stack of Good Fortune the wearer has will increase their CRIT DMG by 8%/9%/10%/11%/12%. Good Fortune will be removed at the end of the wearer's turn.

passive_skill.name: Deflagration
passive_skill.description: When the wearer's cumulative HP loss during one attack exceeds 25% of their Max HP, or if the amount of their own HP consumed at one time is greater than 25% of their Max HP, immediately heals the wearer for 15% of their Max HP, and at the same time, increases the DMG they deal by 25%/31.25%/37.5%/43.75%/50% for 2 turn(s). This effect can only be triggered once every 3 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Gaze
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by 12%. When equipped by Trailblazer (Remembrance), increases all ally targets' DMG dealt by 8% and DMG dealt by Enhanced Basic ATK "Together, We Script Tomorrow!" by 60%.

passive_skill.name: Bonds
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's ATK by 16%/20%/24%/28%/32%. After the wearer uses their Ultimate, increases their DMG dealt by 18%/21%/24%/27%/30%, lasting for 1 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Congratulations
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's ATK by 16%. After the wearer uses their Ultimate, additionally increases the wearer and their memosprite's Basic ATK DMG dealt by 20% for 3 turns.

passive_skill.name: Each Now Has a Role to Play
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's ATK by 16%/20%/24%/28%/32%. When the wearer defeats an enemy, the wearer's CRIT DMG increases by 24%/30%/36%/42%/48% for 3 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Toiler
passive_skill.description: For every debuff the target enemy has, the DMG dealt by the wearer increases by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%, stacking up to 3 time(s). This effect also applies to DoT.

passive_skill.name: I'm Not Afraid!
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Max HP by 8%/9%/10%/11%/12%. When the wearer uses Skill, increases Outgoing Healing by 16%/19%/22%/25%/28%, lasting for 2 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Chill Out
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's DMG dealt by 16%. After the wearer attacks, there is a 100% base chance that the attacked target is inflicted with Vulnerability, increasing the DMG they receive by 10% for 2 turn(s). The same effect type cannot be stacked.

passive_skill.name: Flustered
passive_skill.description: After entering battle, increases all allies' Break DMG dealt by 16%. Abilities of the same type cannot stack.

passive_skill.name: Inheritance
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Break Effect by 28%/35%/42%/49%/56%. When the wearer uses their Ultimate, increases their CRIT Rate by 15%/18.75%/22.5%/26.25%/30%, lasting for 2 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Self-Amusement
passive_skill.description: When the wearer inflicts a debuff on an enemy, gains a stack of Trick. Every stack of Trick increases the wearer's DMG dealt by 6%/7%/8%/9%10%, stacking up to 3 time(s). This effect lasts for 1 turn(s). When the wearer's Effect Hit Rate is 80% or higher, increases ATK by 20%/24%/28%/32%/36%.

passive_skill.name: Sweet Dream
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's provided Shield Effect by 12%. When an ally target has a Shield, the DMG dealt increases by 12%.

passive_skill.name: Time Fleets Away
passive_skill.description: The wearer is more likely to be attacked, but DMG taken is reduced by 16%/18%/20%/22%/24

passive_skill.name: The Power of Sound
passive_skill.description: The wearer regenerates 20/23/26/29/32 Energy immediately upon entering battle, and increases Ultimate DMG by 32%/40%/48%/56%/64%.

passive_skill.name: Old Photo
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Break Effect by 28%/35%/42%/49%/56%. When the wearer attacks, additionally regenerates 4/5/6/7/8 Energy. This effect can only be triggered 1 time per turn.

passive_skill.name: Rumble
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Elation by 12%. When the wearer uses an Elation Skill, increases Elation DMG taken by all enemies by 6% for 2 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Curtains Up!
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Max HP by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%. When losing HP or restoring HP, increases CRIT DMG by 18%/22%/27%/31%/36%, lasting for 2 turn(s). This effect can only trigger 1 time per turn.

passive_skill.name: Desperate Times
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's ATK by 24%/30%/36%/42%/48%. Whenever the wearer defeats an enemy, they restore HP equal to 12%/15%/18%/21%/24% of their ATK.

passive_skill.name: Record
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's ATK by 16%/20%/24%/28%/32%. If there are 2 or fewer enemies on the field, increases wearer's CRIT Rate by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%.

passive_skill.name: Kites From the Past
passive_skill.description: When the wearer uses their Skill, then the next ally taking action (except the wearer) deals 16%/20%/24%/28%/32% increased DMG for 1 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Refraction of Sightline
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Effect RES by 16%/20%/24%/28%/32% and increases Outgoing Healing by an amount that is equal to 33%/36%/39%/42%/45% of Effect RES. Outgoing Healing can be increased this way by up to 15%/18%/21%/24%/27%.

passive_skill.name: Departure
passive_skill.description: After entering battle, when all allies deal the same DMG Type as the wearer, DMG dealt increases by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%.

passive_skill.name: Lose Not, Forget Not
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's ATK by 16%/20%/24%/28%/32%. Upon entering the battle, if there are two or more allies in the team who follow the same Path, these characters' CRIT DMG increases by 16%/20%/24%/28%/32%. Abilities of the same type cannot stack.

passive_skill.name: Mutual Healing
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Energy Regeneration Rate by 8%/10%/12%/14%/16% and increases Outgoing Healing when they use their Ultimate by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%.

passive_skill.name: Enjoy With Rapture
passive_skill.description: At the start of the wearer's turn, regenerates 8/10/12/14/16 Energy for a randomly chosen ally (excluding the wearer) whose current Energy is lower than 50%.

name: Resolution Shines As Pearls of Sweat

passive_skill.name: Glance Back
passive_skill.description: When the wearer hits an enemy and if the hit enemy is not already Ensnared, then there is a 60%/70%/80%/90%/100% base chance to Ensnare the hit enemy. Ensnared enemies' DEF decreases by 12%/13%/14%/15%/16% for 1 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Raging Waves
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%. After a CRIT Hit, there is a 16%/20%/24%/28%/32% fixed chance to dispel 1 buff on the target enemy. This effect can only trigger 1 time per attack.

passive_skill.name: Stave Off the Lingering Cold
passive_skill.description: After entering battle, increases the wearer's SPD by %/9%/10%/11%/12% and DMG by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%. When the wearer takes DMG, this effect will disappear. This effect will resume after the end of the wearer's next turn.

passive_skill.name: Persistence
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by 24%. The Skill DMG and Follow-up ATK DMG dealt by the wearer increase by 24%.

passive_skill.name: Concealment
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Break Effect by 28%/35%/42%/49%/56%. When entering battle or after dealing Break DMG, increases SPD by 8%/9%/10%/11%/12%, lasting for 2 turns. This effect can only trigger once per turn.

passive_skill.name: Cure and Repair
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Outgoing Healing by 10%/12.5%/15%/17.5%/20%. When using Skill, regenerates 2/3/3/4/4 Energy for all allies.

passive_skill.name: Like Before You Leave!
passive_skill.description: Increases the DMG of the wearer's Basic ATK and Skill by 24%/30%/36%/42%/48%. This effect increases by an extra 24%/30%/36%/42%/48% when the wearer's current Energy reaches its max level.

passive_skill.name: Come Train!
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by 12%. When the wearer's memosprite is on the field, increases the wearer and their memosprite's DMG dealt by 24%.

passive_skill.name: Answers of Their Own
passive_skill.description: For each time the wearer hits the same target, DMG dealt increases by 8%/10%/12%/14%/16%, stacking up to 5 time(s). The stack effect will be reset when the wearer changes targets.

passive_skill.name: The Maiden in the Painting
passive_skill.description: Increases DMG dealt by the wearer's follow-up attacks by 24%/30%/36%/42%/48%. If the current HP of the target enemy is below 50% of their Max HP, increases DMG dealt by follow-up attacks by an extra 24%/30%/36%/42%/48%.

passive_skill.name: Stratagem
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's ATK by 16%/18%/20%/22%/24%. When the wearer uses an attack and at least 2 attacked enemies have the corresponding Weakness, the wearer's CRIT DMG increases by 20%/25%/30%/35%/40%, lasting for 2 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Interdependence
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by 24%. The CRIT DMG dealt by the wearer's memosprite increases by 24%.

passive_skill.name: So Good!
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's ATK by 16%. After the wearer uses Skill, increases ATK by 8%, stacking up to 3 times.

passive_skill.name: Mutual Benefit
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's ATK by 8%. For every 1 different Weakness Type an enemy target has, increases the DMG dealt to it by the wearer by 4%. Up to a max of 7 Weakness Types can be taken into account for this effect.

passive_skill.name: Fantastic Adventure
passive_skill.description: When the wearer uses Basic ATK, Skill, or Ultimate to attack enemies, the wearer gains one stack of Mischievous. Each stack increases the wearer's ATK by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%.

passive_skill.name: Get Ready
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's DMG by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%. For every defeated enemy, the wearer's ATK increases by 4%/5%/6%/7%/8%, stacking up to 3 time(s).

passive_skill.name: Written Down
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Max HP by 16%. After the wearer's memosprite attacks, the Outgoing Healing of the wearer and their memosprite increases by 12%, lasting for 1 turn.

passive_skill.name: New Chapter
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's DEF by 16%/20%/24%/28%/32%. Increases the DMG of the wearer when they use their Ultimate by 60%/75%/90%/105%/120% of the wearer's DEF. This effect only apply 1 time per enemy target.

passive_skill.name: A Storm Is Coming
passive_skill.description: After entering battle, increases the wearer's DMG based on their Max Energy. DMG increases by 0.2%/0.25%/0.3%/0.35%/0.4% per point of Energy, up to 160 Energy.

passive_skill.name: Decision
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by 12%. When the wearer uses an Elation Skill, increases Elation by 12%, stacking up to 2 times.

passive_skill.name: Companion
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%. After the wearer uses their Ultimate, increases the Elation of all allies by 8%/9%/10%/11%/12%, lasting for 1 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: A New Round of Shuffling
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's DEF by 16%/20%/24%/28%/32%. When the wearer is attacked, there is a 100% base chance to Burn the enemy. For each turn, the wearer deals DoT that is equal to 40%/50%/60%/70%/80% of the wearer's DEF for 2 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Rye Under the Sun
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's ATK by 16%/20%/24%/28%/32%. When the wearer defeats an enemy, the wearer's CRIT Rate increases by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24% for 3 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Farewell
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Outgoing Healing by 12%. When an ally target's current HP percentage is greater than or equal to 50%, increases the DMG dealt by 12%.

passive_skill.name: Final Hit
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT DMG by 12%. When the wearer's memosprite uses an ability on ally targets, increases all ally targets' DMG dealt by 8%, lasting for 3 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Tiny Light
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Max HP by 16%/20%/24%%/28%/32%. When using Basic ATK or Skill, restores all allies' HP by an amount equal to 2.0%/2.5%/3.0%/3.5%/4% of their respective Max HP.

passive_skill.name: Teary-Eyed
passive_skill.description: At the start of the battle, the DMG dealt to all allies decreases by 8%/10%/12%/14%/16% for 5 turn(s). At the same time, immediately restores HP to all allies equal to 30%/35%/40%/45%/50% of the respective HP difference between the characters' Max HP and current HP.

passive_skill.name: A Discourse in Arms
passive_skill.description: After the wearer uses Basic ATK or Skill, deals Additional DMG equal to 48%/60%/72%/84%/96% of the wearer's ATK to a random enemy that has been attacked.

passive_skill.name: Hypothesis
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Break Effect by 24%/30%/36%/42%/48%. After using Basic ATK, restores HP for the wearer by an amount equal to 2.0%/2.5%/3.0%/3.5%/4.0% of Max HP plus 800.

passive_skill.name: Run!
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's ATK by 10%/12.5%/15%/17.5%/20%, and increases their DMG to enemies afflicted with Burn or Bleed by 16%/20%/24%/28%/32%. This also applies to DoT.

passive_skill.name: Alliance
passive_skill.description: When the wearer defeats an enemy, increases SPD by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18% for 2 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Stasis
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's DEF by 16%/20%/24%/28%/32%. If the wearer's current HP is lower than 50%, increases their DEF by a further 16%/20%/24%/28%/32%.

passive_skill.name: Crisis
passive_skill.description: At the start of the battle, the wearer's CRIT Rate increases by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24% for 3 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Concerted
passive_skill.description: After entering battle, increases the ATK of all allies by 8%/9%/10%/11%/12%. Effects of the same type cannot stack.

passive_skill.name: Havoc
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Basic ATK and Skill DMG by 20%/25%/30%/35%/40%.

passive_skill.name: Prosperity
passive_skill.description: When the wearer uses their Skill or Ultimate, their Outgoing Healing increases by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%.

passive_skill.name: War Cry
passive_skill.description: When the wearer defeats an enemy, increases ATK by 24%/30%/36%/42%/48% for 3 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Learned
passive_skill.description: Increases the wearer's Ultimate DMG by 28%/35%/42%/49%/56%.

passive_skill.name: Revitalization
passive_skill.description: When the wearer unleashes their Ultimate, they restore HP by 18%/21%/24%/27%/30% of their Max HP

passive_skill.name: Savor
passive_skill.description: At the start of the battle, immediately regenerates 6/8/9/11/12 Energy for all allies.

passive_skill.name: Mechanism
passive_skill.description: After using Skill, the wearer's next Basic ATK deals Additional DMG equal to 60%/75%/90%/105%/120% of ATK to the target enemy.

passive_skill.name: Mourning
passive_skill.description: When Punchline is 10 or more, the wearer's CRIT DMG increases by 20%.

passive_skill.name: Pursuit
passive_skill.description: Increases DMG dealt from its wearer to Slowed enemies by 24%/30%/36%/42%/48%.

passive_skill.name: Family
passive_skill.description: Upon entering battle, increases SPD of all allies by 12/14/16/18/20 points for 1 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Fleet Triumph
passive_skill.description: After the wearer attacks or is hit, additionally regenerates 4/5/6/7/8 Energy. This effect can only be triggered 1 time per turn.

passive_skill.name: Denizens of Abundance
passive_skill.description: After the wearer uses their Basic ATK, their next action will be Advanced Forward by 12%/14%/16%/18%/20%.

passive_skill.name: Legion
passive_skill.description: If the wearer's current HP is lower than 80%, CRIT Rate increases by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%.

passive_skill.name: Epiphany
passive_skill.description: After the wearer uses their Skill, additionally regenerates 8/9/10/11/12 Energy. This effect can only be triggered 1 time per turn.

passive_skill.name: IPC
passive_skill.description: When the wearer Breaks an enemy's Weakness, the wearer restores HP by 12%/14%/16%/18%/20% of their Max HP.

passive_skill.name: Going to Sleep
passive_skill.description: When memosprite's turn starts, the wearer and the memosprite each gain 1 stack of "Commemoration." Each stack increases DMG dealt by 8%, stacking up to 4 time(s). "Commemoration" is removed from the wearer and the memosprite when the memosprite disappears.

passive_skill.name: Genius
passive_skill.description: When the wearer uses their Ultimate, increases ATK by 24%/30%/36%/42%/48% for 2 turn(s).

passive_skill.name: Beautify
passive_skill.description: When the wearer summons memosprite for the first time in battle, recovers 1 Skill Point(s) and regenerates 12 Energy for this unit.

passive_skill.name: Eradication
passive_skill.description: Deals 20%/25%/30%/35%/40% increased DMG to any enemies whose HP is above 50%.

passive_skill.name: Indulgence
passive_skill.description: When Aha Instant is activated, the wearer's Elation increases by 16%, lasting until Aha Instant ends.

passive_skill.name: Fallen
passive_skill.description: At the start of the battle, increases the wearer's Effect Hit Rate by 20%/25%/30%/35%/40% for 3 turn(s).
